draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my highest recommendation for Ms. Varsha Patel, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. As an experienced entrepreneur and venture capitalist, I have had the opportunity to observe Ms. Patel's remarkable accomplishments and contributions firsthand.

By way of introduction, I am the Managing Partner at Horizon Ventures, a seed-stage venture capital firm based in the Silicon Valley. Since March 2020, I have been leading the firm in identifying and nurturing early-stage startups. Horizon Ventures has been the first investor in companies that have collectively created over $3.5 billion in value. Our firm has a strong track record of supporting innovative technology companies and helping them scale to success.

Before founding Horizon Ventures, I gained extensive experience in the technology and startup ecosystem. From 2011 to 2018, I served as the CEO of BlueSky Co. and Co-Founder & CEO of SkyCloud, which was acquired by BlueSky Co. These roles provided me with firsthand experience in building and growing technology companies. Additionally, I was a Part-time Partner at SeedLab from 2013 to 2018, where I worked closely with numerous startups and gained deep insights into the factors that drive their success.

My educational background includes a Bachelor of Applied Science (BASc) in Engineering Science, specializing in Computer Engineering, from the University of Waterloo. I also pursued a Master of Applied Science (MASc) in Electrical and Computer Engineering, focusing on Distributed Systems and Security, before leaving to co-found SkyCloud. This technical foundation, combined with my extensive experience in the startup ecosystem, has equipped me with the skills and insights necessary to identify and support high-potential technology ventures.

Throughout my career, I have developed a keen ability to recognize exceptional talent and potential in entrepreneurs. I have been an active angel investor since January 2014, contributing to the early stages of various startups that have now achieved a combined market value of over $20 billion. My successful investment track record in high-value companies such as Streamline, Chemosynth, Supersonic Aviation, and TechBridge demonstrates my expertise and influential status in the startup investment scene. This extensive experience has provided me with a deep understanding of the qualities that drive entrepreneurial success, enabling me to identify and support individuals who possess the vision, skills, and determination to make a significant impact in their respective fields.

My expertise extends to a broad range of technical and business skills, including Distributed Systems, Software Development, Entrepreneurship, and Start-ups. These skills are critical in evaluating and advising technology-oriented businesses and contribute to my comprehensive understanding of the tech industry. Additionally, my multilingual abilities in English, Spanish, and French enhance my communication capabilities and reflect my ability to connect and work within diverse cultural contexts.

In my role as Managing Partner at Horizon Ventures, I have had the opportunity to work closely with Ms. Varsha Patel and her company, SecureSphere. Horizon Ventures has invested $500,000 in SecureSphere, recognizing the company's innovative approach to securing generative AI applications and the significant market potential of their solutions. This investment has allowed me to gain valuable insights into Ms. Patel's leadership, vision, and technical expertise, further solidifying my confidence in her extraordinary abilities.

Ms. Varsha Patel is a seasoned product leader and entrepreneur with over a decade of expertise in engineering and product management. Her deep domain experience in cybersecurity, particularly in the context of generative AI applications, sets her apart as an extraordinary individual in her field. As the Co-Founder and CEO of SecureSphere, Ms. Patel has demonstrated remarkable leadership and innovation in addressing critical data security challenges faced by enterprises using generative AI tools like GenText.

Under Ms. Patel's leadership, SecureSphere has developed a cutting-edge solution that helps enterprises secure their data when using generative AI applications. The company's flagship product, SecureCore, is designed to prevent data leakage and ensure compliance with data protection regulations. This innovative approach has garnered significant attention from the industry and attracted top-tier investors.

SecureSphere's impressive achievements under Ms. Patel's guidance are a testament to her extraordinary abilities. The company has successfully raised over $3.8 million in seed funding from prestigious investors, including SeedLab, Sprint Capital, and other angel investors. This substantial financial backing reflects the confidence that the investment community has in Ms. Patel's vision and the potential of SecureSphere's solutions.

The product's adoption by multiple top American enterprises further underscores its effectiveness and the trust that leading organizations place in SecureSphere to protect their sensitive data. Ms. Patel's ability to secure such high-profile clients demonstrates her exceptional skills in product development, business strategy, and relationship building.

Ms. Patel's previous roles further highlight her extraordinary abilities and extensive experience in the field of cybersecurity and product management. At Silicon Valley Networks, she served as a Senior Product Manager for Data Integrity from November 2021 to September 2023. In this role, she was responsible for the API-based Data Integrity product, which generated over $50 million in annual recurring revenue and had a mature install base of large enterprises. Ms. Patel's leadership and strategic vision were instrumental in doubling the business to over $100 million in just two years. She also played a key role in integrating AlphaSec, a $36 million acquisition, into the Data Integrity product, bringing new real-time integrations and advanced detection capabilities to the solution.

Prior to her tenure at Silicon Valley Networks, Ms. Patel held several critical positions at NetworkSecure Inc., a leading cybersecurity company. As a Senior Product Manager for Network Defense from February 2020 to November 2021, she achieved over 30% annual recurring revenue growth for the network defense product by revamping its strategy and reversing a negative trend from 2020. She also conceptualized and launched an award-winning serverless security solution, pioneering NetworkSecure's entry into Cloud Native Protection. Ms. Patel developed the go-to-market strategy for the acquisition of DataFlow, a transaction closed by NetworkSecure in October 2020. In her earlier role as Product Manager for Information Security from February 2019 to January 2020, she released a data adapter that allowed customers to import information security events into any platform of choice at scale through StreamFlow. This free add-on was well-received by top banking and retail customers and significantly aided in customer retention.

Ms. Patel's impressive track record extends to her time at Creative Systems Inc., where she worked as a Software Development Engineer from June 2012 to July 2017. During her tenure, she led product enhancements for the Creative Advertising Network, a portfolio optimization platform for digital ads. Her contributions included redesigning the primary interface through which customers handled billions of advertising artifacts, making it 40% faster and more reusable. She also developed advertising tracking support for mobile app events, enabling deal closures with major e-commerce players.

In addition to her corporate roles, Ms. Patel has demonstrated her entrepreneurial spirit and product management expertise as the Co-Founder and Director of Products at DataFocus Inc. from September 2013 to June 2017. DataFocus aimed to bring analytics to small businesses at minimal cost with its free and paid products. Its flagship product, Insight, achieved paying customers and accounted for about 80% of the company's monthly recurring revenue. Ms. Patel had end-to-end responsibility for the product, including designing features and UI mock-ups, providing customer support, and managing a team of three developers. She was involved in all aspects of the business, including general management, hiring, marketing, finance, customer support, and IT maintenance across the product lines.

Ms. Patel's impressive track record of success in various product management and leadership roles, coupled with her technical expertise and entrepreneurial spirit, make her an extraordinary individual in the field of cybersecurity and generative AI applications. Her ability to drive significant business growth, develop innovative solutions, and lead high-performing teams underscores her exceptional qualifications and potential for continued success.

Ms. Patel's educational background further underscores her extraordinary capabilities. She holds a Master of Science degree in System Design and Management from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), completed between September 2017 and February 2019. This prestigious program, offered jointly by the School of Engineering and the Sloan School of Management, is known for its rigorous curriculum that combines engineering and management principles. Ms. Patel's outstanding academic performance, with a GPA of 4.9 out of 5, demonstrates her strong analytical and problem-solving skills, as well as her ability to excel in a challenging academic environment.

Prior to her studies at MIT, Ms. Patel earned a Master of Science degree in Software Engineering from Vikram College of Technology in Mysore, India. This five-year integrated program, completed between August 2007 and June 2012, provided her with a solid foundation in software development and engineering principles. Her impressive GPA of 8.6 out of 10 reflects her dedication and proficiency in her field of study.

Ms. Patel's educational achievements, combined with her extensive professional experience, position her as an extraordinary individual with the skills and knowledge necessary to make significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity and generative AI applications.

In conclusion, Ms. Varsha Patel is an extraordinary individual whose remarkable achievements, extensive experience, and innovative vision have positioned her as a leader in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. Her ability to secure significant funding, develop cutting-edge solutions, and lead high-performing teams underscores her exceptional qualifications and potential for continued success. As the Co-Founder and CEO of SecureSphere, Ms. Patel has demonstrated her extraordinary capabilities by addressing critical data security challenges faced by enterprises using generative AI tools. Her impressive track record of success in various product management and leadership roles, combined with her technical expertise and entrepreneurial spirit, make her an invaluable asset to any organization.

If you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely,


Amit Joshi
Managing Partner
Horizon Ventures
amit@horizonvc.com
final:
To Whom it May Concern:

This letter is written to serve as my strongest recommendation of Mr. Varsha Patel, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. In my capacity as an experienced entrepreneur and venture capitalist, I have had the opportunity to observe Mr. Patel's remarkable accomplishments and contributions firsthand.

For context, I am the Managing Partner at Horizon Ventures, a seed-stage venture capital firm based in the Silicon Valley. Since March 2020, I have been leading the firm in identifying and nurturing early-stage startups. Horizon Ventures has been the first investor in companies that have collectively created over $3.5 billion in value. Our firm has a strong track record of supporting innovative technology companies and helping them scale to success. Before founding Horizon Ventures, I gained extensive experience in the technology and startup ecosystem. From 2011 to 2018, I served as the CEO of BlueSky Co. and Co-Founder & CEO of SkyCloud, which was acquired by BlueSky Co. These roles provided me with firsthand experience in building and growing technology companies. Additionally, I was a part-time Partner at SeedLab from 2013 to 2018, where I worked closely with numerous startups and gained deep insights into the factors that drive their success.

In my role as Managing Partner at Horizon Ventures, I have had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Patel and his company, SecureSphere. Horizon Ventures recognized the company's innovative approach to securing generative AI applications and the significant market potential of their solutions. This collaboration has allowed me to gain valuable insights into Mr. Patel's leadership, vision, and technical expertise, further solidifying my confidence in his extraordinary abilities.

Mr. Patel is a seasoned product leader and entrepreneur with over a decade of expertise in engineering and product management. His deep domain experience in cybersecurity, particularly in the context of generative AI applications, sets him apart as an extraordinary individual in his field. As the Co-Founder and CEO of SecureSphere, Mr. Patel has demonstrated remarkable leadership and innovation in addressing critical data security challenges faced by enterprises using generative AI tools like GenText.

Under Mr. Patel's leadership, SecureSphere has developed a cutting-edge solution addressing the urgent need for data security in generative AI applications. Instrumental in the development of SecureCore's flagship product, Mr. Patel ensured it prevents data leakage and complies with data protection regulations. His expertise has led to creating a system that secures data in real-time while integrating smoothly with enterprise systems. This innovative approach not only supports varying compliance frameworks but has also earned the trust of major enterprises handling sensitive data. As a result, SecureSphere has drawn significant interest from top-tier investors, establishing its reputation in the cybersecurity industry for generative AI technologies.

SecureSphere's impressive achievements under Mr. Patel's guidance are a testament to his remarkable abilities. The company has successfully raised over $3.8 million in seed funding from prestigious investors, including SeedLab, Sprint Capital, and other angel investors. This substantial financial backing reflects the confidence that the investment community has in Mr. Patel's vision and the potential of SecureSphere's solutions. Notably, Horizon Ventures awarded Mr. Patel and SecureSphere a $500,000 investment due to his expertise and strategic foresight.

The product's adoption by multiple top American enterprises further underscores its effectiveness and the trust that leading organizations place in SecureSphere to protect their sensitive data. Mr. Patel's ability to secure such high-profile clients demonstrates his exceptional skills in product development, business strategy, and relationship building.

Mr. Patel's previous roles further highlight his remarkable abilities in cybersecurity and product management. His contributions at Silicon Valley Networks underscore his outstanding expertise. As a Senior Product Manager for Data Integrity, he masterminded the growth of an API-based Data Integrity product that surpassed $50 million in annual recurring revenue, penetrating a mature market of large enterprises. His strategic insight was pivotal in the seamless integration of AlphaSec, a $36 million acquisition, into the Data Integrity suite, introducing groundbreaking real-time integrations and enhancing the solution's advanced detection capabilities.

Before his impactful tenure at Silicon Valley Networks, Mr. Patel was instrumental at NetworkSecure Inc., a leading cybersecurity firm in the Silicon Valley. As a Senior Product Manager, he spearheaded the launch of NetworkSecure's serverless security solution from concept to MVP, driving significant growth in the Network Defense business through innovative product development and strategic adjustments in the go-to-market approach. As a Product Manager for Information Security before that, Mr. Patel crafted a cutting-edge reporting solution built on open-source technologies, providing clients with versatile data export capabilities. He also devised a highly effective go-to-market strategy for the acquisition of DataFlow, demonstrating his strategic acumen and contribution to the company's success.

Mr. Patel's impressive track record of success in various product management and leadership roles, coupled with his technical expertise and entrepreneurial spirit, make him an extraordinary individual in the field of cybersecurity and generative AI applications. His ability to drive significant business growth, develop innovative solutions, and lead high-performing teams underscores his remarkable qualifications and potential for continued success.

Mr. Patel's educational background highlights his remarkable capabilities in the fields of engineering and management. He holds a Master of Science in System Design and Management from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) and a Master of Science in Software Engineering from Vikram College of Technology. His academic journey reflects his strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, demonstrating his capacity to excel in demanding academic settings. The comprehensive foundation acquired through his degrees has been instrumental in shaping his successful career in technology and cybersecurity. This robust combination of educational excellence and professional achievement has built significant confidence among investors in his vision and leadership.

In conclusion, Mr. Varsha Patel is a visionary leader whose impressive blend of technical acumen, entrepreneurial spirit, and strategic foresight uniquely positions him at the forefront of the cybersecurity and generative AI sectors. His innovative contributions have not only propelled SecureSphere to new heights but have also garnered the trust and backing of leading investors and enterprises. With a proven track record of transforming challenges into opportunities, Mr. Patel continues to redefine industry standards, underlining his potential to achieve even greater success in the future. His combination of academic prowess and professional accomplishments makes him a standout figure, well-poised to drive meaningful advancements in his field.

If you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Yours truly,


Amit Joshi
Managing Partner
Horizon Ventures
